top_articles.title: Cisco Warns of Available PoC for Critical Unified CM Vulnerability
top_articles.summary: The high-severity flaw can be exploited remotely, without authentication, in server-side request forgery (SSRF) attacks.

top_articles.title: Cisco warns of critical Unified CM flaw with PoC exploit code
top_articles.summary: Cisco has released security updates to patch a critical-severity Unified Communications Manager (Unified CM) flaw that allows attackers to gain root privileges.

top_articles.title: Acer working to patch max severity zero-days in Wave 7 routers
top_articles.summary: Acer is working to address two maximum-severity zero-day vulnerabilities affecting its Wave 7 mesh routers.

top_articles.title: Critical Vulnerability in HP VoIP Phones Enables Enterprise Network Breaches
top_articles.summary: A stack-based buffer overflow bug can be exploited for remote code execution on a vulnerable device.

top_articles.title: Google fixes one actively exploited Android zero-day, 124 flaws
top_articles.summary: Google has released the June 2026 Android security patches to address 124 vulnerabilities, including one zero-day flaw exploited in targeted attacks.

top_articles.title: Exploit Code Published for Critical Flowise RCE Vulnerability
top_articles.summary: The one-click vulnerability allows attackers to execute arbitrary code on self-hosted Flowise servers by tricking users into importing a malicious chatflow.
